name: crew
description: Crew — study session scheduling for high schoolers.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && python -m venv matching-service\.venv && matching-service\.venv\Scripts\pip install -r matching-service\requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,matching,client -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "matching-service\.venv\Scripts\python matching-service\app.py" "npm --prefix client run dev"
